title: Search Keyword
gist: Light card: this is a statistical-publication landing fragment, not a research article. The body is mostly cookie-consent boilerplate; the only substantive content is a notice that the SNB released its IMF SDDS Plus statistical update on 12 June 2026, with a link to the data portal.

insights.claim: The SNB published its IMF Special Data Dissemination Standard (SDDS Plus) statistical update on 12 June 2026, available via the SNB data portal.
insights.speaker: SNB Research
insights.so_what: Flags the release date of SNB's IMF-standard macro statistics for anyone tracking Swiss data calendars; no analytical content on the page itself.
